name: Human Capital, Not Model Benchmarks, Predicts Hybrid Intelligence in Forecasting
content: Whether pairing people with AI helps or hurts is usually reported as a single average effect. Using a real-money prediction market (Polymarket) as an objective, externally resolved benchmark, this pilot shows that the value of human-AI collaboration depends on a specific, measurable form of human capital. Analyzed at the level of the individual forecaster, hybrid performance is trimodal: most people either deferred to the model (matching it) or used it to rubber-stamp a prior guess (performing w
summary: 研究发现，人类与AI的合作效果取决于个体的人类资本，具体表现为在预测任务中的表现。大多数参与者要么完全依赖模型，要么只是复制之前的猜测，只有少数人能够通过互补性推理达到与市场相当甚至更好的准确度。
key_insights: 合作绩效取决于特定、可衡量的人类资本形式
协作特质（如移情能力、谦逊和好奇心）是区分高绩效者的因素
研究结果初步但统计上稳健，为未来的预注册再验证铺路
xihe_relevance: 对曦和的潜在价值不高
